# USA Estimating Solutions

> USA Estimating Solutions is a professional construction estimating company serving all 50 U.S. states (plus the UK, Canada, Australia, and worldwide). We deliver detailed material takeoffs, labor breakdowns, and bid-ready cost estimates for residential, commercial, and industrial projects, with zip-code-based RSMeans pricing for market-accurate results. Fast 24-48 hour turnaround, 99% accuracy, 92% bid success rate, and 24/7 support. Recognized by The Blue Book Network. Powered by Bluebeam, RSMeans, PlanSwift, and Xactimate. Email: info@usaestimatingsolutions.com.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/): Overview of estimating services, trades, sample works, and quotes.
- [Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/services): Full list of construction estimating and scheduling services.
- [Trades](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/our-trades): Trade coverage across structural, MEP, interior, and exterior estimating.
- [Our Works](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/samples): Sample estimates and completed project examples.
- [Prices](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/pricing): Pricing information for estimating services.
- [About](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/about): Company background and experience.
- [Blogs](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/blog): Articles on construction estimating and cost control.
- [Contact](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/contact): Quote requests and enquiry form.

## Services

- [Cost Estimation](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/cost-estimation): Accurate cost estimates for confident budgeting and competitive bids.
- [Construction Estimation](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/construction-estimation): Detailed estimates covering labor, materials, equipment, and overhead.
- [Construction Takeoff](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/construction-takeoff): Precise quantity takeoffs that improve bid accuracy.
- [Residential Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/residential-estimation): Estimating solutions for residential projects of all sizes.
- [Commercial Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/commercial-estimating): Comprehensive estimates for complex, large-scale commercial projects.
- [Industrial Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/industrial-estimating): Accurate industrial estimates aligned with strict standards.
- [Preliminary Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/preliminary-estimating): Early-stage cost insights for planning and feasibility.
- [CPM Scheduling](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/cpm-scheduling): Professional CPM schedules to optimize timelines and coordination.
- [Interior Design Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/interior-design-services): Functional, well-planned interior space design.
- [BIM Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/bim-estimating): 5D BIM cost estimation, quantity surveying, and model-based takeoffs.
- [Blueprint Estimating Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/blueprint-estimating-services): Material takeoffs, labor costs, and bid-ready estimates in 24-48 hours.
- [Budget Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/budget-estimating): Budget estimates, detailed cost breakdowns, and budget development.
- [Construction Estimating Consultant](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/estimating-consultant): CEP-certified cost modeling and third-party bid audits.
- [Construction Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/construction-estimating): Trade-specific takeoffs and bid-ready documents for all sectors.
- [Dedicated Construction Estimator](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/dedicated-construction-estimator): One dedicated expert with full trade coverage, saving up to 60% vs in-house hiring.
- [Freelance Construction Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/freelance-estimating): Expert freelance estimators with no overhead and fast turnaround.
- [Residential Estimating Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/residential-estimating): Certified estimators delivering takeoffs and bid-ready estimates in 24-48 hours.
- [Xactimate Estimating Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/xactimate-estimating-services): Insurance-ready property damage estimates for contractors, adjusters, and homeowners.
- [Building Cost Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/building-cost-estimating): Building cost estimation services.
- [MS Project Scheduling Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/ms-project-scheduling-services): Professional MS Project scheduling with 24/7 support and fast turnaround.
- [Preliminary Estimate](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/preliminary-estimate): ROM, ballpark, and budget estimates in 24-48 hours.
- [Primavera Scheduling Services](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/primavera-scheduling-services): Forensic delay analysis and Time Impact Analysis (TIA).
- [Single Family Residential](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/single-family-residential): Detailed cost breakdowns for new builds, renovations, and additions.

## Trades

- [Structural Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/structural): Concrete foundations, structural steel, rebar, precast, masonry, earthwork, and site prep.
- [MEP Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/mep): HVAC, process piping, plumbing, electrical, fire protection, and building controls (FastPIPE, FastDUCT, Xactimate).
- [Interior Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/interior): Drywall, ceilings, flooring, millwork, cabinetry, painting, and acoustic treatments.
- [Exterior Estimating](https://usaestimatingsolutions.com/exterior): Roofing, cladding, curtain wall glazing, waterproofing, facade systems, and site work.

## Key Facts

- Serves all 50 U.S. states, plus UK, Canada, Australia, and worldwide.
- Fast turnaround: residential estimates in 24-48 hours; commercial/industrial within a few business days.
- 99% accuracy, 92% bid success rate, 24/7 customer support.
- Uses zip-code-based RSMeans pricing for market-accurate labor and material costs (not national averages).
- Covers residential, commercial, industrial, infrastructure, and public sector projects.
- Provides federal/state procurement-compliant estimates for government-funded and public infrastructure work.
- Construction takeoff quantifies materials/labor/equipment; estimating applies current market pricing - both offered as an integrated service.
- Recognized by The Blue Book Network; affordable pricing.
- Software: Bluebeam, RSMeans, PlanSwift, Xactimate.
